title: Coupled Coil Baseline
summary: Initial protocol for measuring transfer behavior between two air-core coils under controlled spacing, alignment, frequency, and load conditions.

images.alt: Technical diagram of two aligned air-core coils on a measurement rail
images.caption: Apparatus geometry / axial coil baseline

objective: Establish a repeatable induction bench and define the baseline variables that must be controlled before more complex resonant tests.
apparatus: Primary and secondary air-core coils mounted on an insulated rail, function generator, oscilloscope, load resistors, ruler fixture, and thermal observation.
observations: The first public record defines the measurement geometry rather than claiming performance. Coil distance, angular alignment, drive frequency, and load resistance will be recorded at each interval.
next: Build the sweep table and compare unloaded secondary voltage against loaded behavior across fixed spacing increments.

measurements.label: Controlled variables
measurements.value: Frequency, drive voltage, coil axis, load resistance
